_comment: Agent registry. Single source of truth for launch-agent.sh, chq-tmux.sh, and the Electron remote. Add a new agent by appending one entry — no new bash file needed.

_field_docs.id: Stable lookup key. Used by launch-agent.sh <id>, chq-tmux.sh start <id>, and the Electron remote button id.
_field_docs.display_name: Value passed to claude's -n <Name> flag. Load-bearing — used by ps-grep detection and pane targeting.
_field_docs.tmux_target: Pane title used for broadcast + status targeting. Defaults to lowercased rename_to when present, otherwise lowercased display_name. Only set explicitly to override that derivation.
_field_docs.cwd: Working directory the launcher cd's into before exec. Tilde-expanded by launch-agent.sh.
_field_docs.color: Argument to claude's /color slash command. Set during the auto-inject sequence.
_field_docs.rename_to: Argument to claude's /rename slash command. Defaults to display_name uppercased.
_field_docs.startup_slash: Slash command auto-injected after boot (default /gogo). Empty string disables.
_field_docs.auto_restart: If false, chq-tmux.sh's pane_loop exits after the agent quits instead of relooping after RESTART_DELAY. Default true (omit the field to mean true). Editable from the Electron remote's right-click menu.
_field_docs.pre_launch: Optional path to a hook script run before exec claude. Tilde-expanded. Replaces the inline telegram-cleanup blocks.
_field_docs.env: Optional map of env vars to export before exec (e.g. KOKORO_VOICE for the telegram-voice-followup hook).
_field_docs.avatar: Optional avatar SVG filename inside remote-app/assets/. Defaults to <id>.svg if unset. Used by the Electron remote button render.
